sub_modules.fft16_bit_reverse: Combinational bit-reversal address mapper used while loading the input memory for DIT ordering.
sub_modules.fft16_pair_address: Combinational stage controller helper that computes butterfly p/q addresses and twiddle index from stage, group, and butterfly counters.
sub_modules.fft16_twiddle_rom: Combinational Q1.15 twiddle coefficient ROM for N=16, using positive sine for IFFT mode and negative sine for FFT mode.
sub_modules.fft16_butterfly_q15: Combinational radix-2 complex butterfly with rounded Q1.15 fixed-point twiddle multiplication.
sub_modules.fft16_ifft_scale: Combinational output scaler that applies the final arithmetic divide-by-16 in IFFT mode.
